name: Salmon Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium Green Bell Pepper, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1) Drain the canned salmon and place it in a large mixing bowl.
Add the remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly. The croquette mixture should be moist and not too chunky.
2) Grease one or two large heavy skillets lightly with oil and heat over medium heat (a seasoned cast-iron skillet is ideal). Use about 1/4 cup of the croquette mixture to form patties that are approximately 3 inches across and about 1/2 inch thick. Cook the croquettes, turning them once, until golden brown on both sides, about 4 minutes. Serve hot.
